lb26001_006_safe_recovery_guidance.reason: Automatic restart is forbidden while SolidWorks is unresponsive or an unsaved document marker is visible.
steps: In SolidWorks, manually save or close the visible unsaved document before any automated CAD job starts.
Rerun this no-COM readiness audit after SolidWorks is responsive.
Only when readiness is ready, rerun the no-COM 006 rerun packet.
Then run exactly one locked LB26001-A-04-006 CAD regression through staged_cad_validation_v3.
do_not: Do not kill or restart SLDWORKS.exe from automation while unsaved work may exist.
Do not start 007/008/009/015/022 acceptance before 006 passes.
Do not use API or file creation as a substitute for the Drawing Review UI screenshot judgement.

latest_manual_findings: Application Drawing Review UI screenshot was inspected side by side with the same-name reference.
The run uses current-run generated PNG evidence from drw_output/runs/2aba76ff152d.
DisplayDim lifecycle now passes, but the visible drawing still fails the final UI screenshot review.
Final exact prune attempted to reduce the sheet, but restored the over-dense state because deleting to 12 lost required target coverage.
API metrics are supporting evidence only; this UI screenshot review is the final gate and is FAIL.

latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated drawing still differs materially from the same-name reference: visible dimension density, diagonal/cross-region dimension lines, and title/notes placement remain non-reference-like.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: View family is present, but view scale, visual organization, and dimension geometry do not match the compact reference drawing.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: The final sheet still contains 24 visible DisplayDims, far above the 12 reference-intent target count.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Dimension text, leaders, extension lines, and diagonal cross-region geometry dominate the drawing and reduce manufacturing readability.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.title_block: The title/data area remains positioned and formatted differently from the reference.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Manufacturing notes are present but still not formatted or placed like the reference note block.

lb26001_006_ui_evidence.latest_manual_required_correction: Improve reference-intent DisplayDim selection so the exact 12 kept dimensions cover every required target without retaining dense duplicate/cross-region dimensions, then run exactly one locked 006-only CAD cycle and repeat the Drawing Review UI screenshot/manual checklist gate.
